prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科（物理类）最低位次分别约为 59 名、62 名、50 名、946 名、72 名。2024 年因专业组细分出现异常低位（946 名），但 2025 年迅速回归至 72 名，显示清华在广西理科的常规录取位次稳定在 50–70 名区间，2025 年基准位次约 72 名；2021–2023 年理科计划分别为 38、38、37 人；2024 年物理类计划 37 人；2025 年物理类计划 43 人；2026 年物理类计划增至 48 人，较 2025 年扩招约 11.6%，扩招幅度明显，有助于缓解竞争压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 清华大学，985、211、双一流高校，软科中国大学排名连续多年位列第 1 名（2021–2026 年均为第 1 名），学校层次为全国最高水平；2026 年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及学校管理、校园安全及食堂宿舍等一般性事件，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度排名第 2（高热），短视频平台曝光量极高，报考关注度持续旺盛；历史投档异常记录中清华大学仅出现常规录取热度报道，未见断档信号；清华大学拥有众多 A+ 学科，包括计算机科学与技术、控制科学与工程、机械工程、材料科学与工程、环境科学与工程、建筑学、土木工程、电气工程、临床医学等，学科实力覆盖理、工、医等多个领域，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等清华核心工科专业社会热度持续高热；广西 2026 年普通高考总人数约 39.2 万，较 2025 年（约 38 万）小幅增加，物理类考生估算约 26.9 万人，竞争略有加剧；清华大学位于北京，在广西招生占比约 2.2%（2025 年），属跨省招生，无本省倾斜优势，但清华作为全国性顶尖学府，地域因素对报考影响极小。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 72 名、2026 年扩招约 11.6%（使位次数字增大）、广西考生总数小幅增加（使竞争略加剧）以及学校声誉中性偏负面等因素，扩招效应与考生增加效应基本抵消。预测 2026 年理科最低位次约77名，区间67–87名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 59, 62, 50, 946, and 72 respectively. In 2024, an abnormally low ranking (946) occurred due to detailed major grouping, but in 2025 it quickly returned to 72, indicating that Tsinghua's regular admission ranking in Guangxi science is stable in the 50–70 range, with a baseline ranking of about 72 in 2025; science enrollment plans from 2021 to 2023 were 38, 38, and 37 respectively; in 2024, the physics category plan was 37; in 2025, the physics category plan was 43; in 2026, the physics category plan increased to 48, an expansion of about 11.6% compared to 2025, which is significant and helps alleviate competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tsinghua University, a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, has ranked 1st in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings for many consecutive years (1st from 2021 to 2026), making it the highest level nationally; in 2026, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving general incidents related to school management, campus safety, and cafeteria dormitories, with no major negative public opinion; its Douyin popularity ranks 2nd (high heat), with extremely high exposure on short video platforms, indicating sustained strong application interest; historical abnormal admission records for Tsinghua University only show regular admission heat reports, with no signs of enrollment gaps; Tsinghua University has numerous A+ disciplines, including Computer Science and Technology, Control Science and Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Environmental Science and Engineering, Architecture, Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Clinical Medicine, etc., covering multiple fields such as science, engineering, and medicine, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core engineering majors at Tsinghua, such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering, continue to have high social popularity; in 2026, the total number of ordinary college entrance examination takers in Guangxi is about 392,000, a slight increase from about 380,000 in 2025, with an estimated 269,000 physics category examinees, leading to slightly intensified competition; Tsinghua University is located in Beijing, with an enrollment share in Guangxi of about 2.2% (2025), making it a cross-provincial enrollment with no local advantage, but as a national top-tier institution, regional factors have minimal impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 72, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 11.6% (which increases the ranking number), the slight increase in the total number of Guangxi examinees (which slightly intensifies competition), and the neutral to slightly negative school reputation, the expansion effect and the examinee increase effect roughly offset each other. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for science in 2026 will be about 77, with a range of 67–87.

If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, with Tier 1 majors as a sprint option (such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, etc.), and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 67), you can focus on sprinting for top Tier 1 majors.

In 2021, the liberal arts enrollment plan was 2 students; in 2024, the history category plan was 2 students; in 2025, the history category plan was 3 students; in 2026, the history category plan is 3 students. 学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tsinghua University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranked 1st nationally by Soft Science, representing the highest level in the country. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, but there is no major negative public opinion. Its Douyin popularity ranks 2nd (high heat), indicating extremely high application attention. Historical admission anomaly records show no signs of a gap in Tsinghua's liberal arts admissions. 专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has a social popularity that is slightly hot (recommended), while economics and finance are differentiated and wait-and-see. In 2026, the estimated number of history category examinees in Guangxi is about 123,000, a slight increase from 2025 (about 119,000), leading to slightly intensified competition. Tsinghua University is located in Beijing, and its liberal arts enrollment in Guangxi is only 2–3 students, a very small-scale enrollment, so ranking fluctuations are greatly affected by the application behavior of individual high-scoring students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 10th, unchanged enrollment plan, and a slight increase in total examinees, competition has slightly intensified but to a limited extent. Given the very small number of liberal arts admission slots at Tsinghua (3 students), the ranking fluctuation space is limited. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for liberal arts in 2026 will be approximately 7th, with a range of 2–12th.
